tax: Placed at class rank, Earth Elementals is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a pure earth-element body of stone, crystal, or metal, animated by tectonic pressure, seep chemistry, or earth-charge. A new order belongs here only if it shows a distinct earth-state body-plan with its own formation mechanism and field signs.
ap: The grouping is recognised by a mineral mass — boulder, crystal cluster, or metal coil — that moves against the logic of settled terrain. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — ground tremor, shed crystal, verdigris, or rust left where the body stood or passed — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Earth Elementals occupies the load-bearing stone of the gorge: benches, chutes, clay and dust galleries, crystal seams, copper galleries, and iron bogs. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where a fault flexes, a mineral seep saturates, or an ore-seam takes a charge and recur with the same tremor, seep, or charge renews the body from the same substrate, sustaining themselves on tectonic pressure, gravity, mineral supersaturation, or earth-charge.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: members lie inert as terrain and rouse only to disturbance of their own substrate, answering as rockfall, shard-growth, or current. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: a contact-bound earth body, immunity to the hazards of its own state, and a specific medium-failure. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each order and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: reshaping and absorbing ground, mass or momentum or current attacks, and concealment as terrain. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Earth Elementals matters because most fatal 'natural' stone, crystal, and ore hazards on the worked tiers are roused Earth elementals. It lets survey reports sort earth hazards by state, so a crew knows whether to fear mass, shard, smother, abrasion, or current without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Earth Elementals is the class-rank grouping of true elementals composed of the earth element in all its states within the True Elementals. Its members share a body of solid matter — rock, crystal, or metal — that depends on contact with the ground and forms from earth-pressure or earth-charge rather than breeding, and divide below into order groups by the state and ordering of that matter: bulk rock (Lithic), ordered crystal (Crystalline), or native metal (Metalline). Earth is the most populous elemental class in the Throat because the gorge is, above all, stone.
